claim_boundary: Replay/shuffle controls are derived audit artifacts; performance claims are made against actual fixed/ablation controls plus event-count replay.

active_mask_shuffle.description: Derived telemetry audit that shuffles alive-count masks; not a learner, only a mechanism-control artifact.
active_mask_shuffle.label: active-mask shuffle audit

fixed_initial.description: Fixed CRA at the same initial population; no birth/death lifecycle.
fixed_initial.label: fixed initial N

fixed_max.description: Fixed CRA with the full max pool available from step 0; tests extra-capacity explanation.
fixed_max.label: fixed max pool

intact.description: Unmodified lifecycle-enabled CRA; the Tier 6.1 mechanism under test.
intact.label: intact lifecycle

lineage_id_shuffle.description: Derived lineage audit that deliberately corrupts lineage IDs to prove lineage integrity checks are meaningful.
lineage_id_shuffle.label: lineage-ID shuffle audit

no_dopamine.description: Dopamine teaching signal is clamped to zero while the task stream and lifecycle code remain present.
no_dopamine.label: no dopamine

no_plasticity.description: Predictive readout and structural plasticity are disabled; lifecycle bookkeeping may still execute.
no_plasticity.label: no plasticity

no_trophic.description: Lifecycle capacity remains, but selective trophic survival/reproduction pressure is flattened.
no_trophic.label: no trophic pressure

random_event_replay.description: Derived sham using fixed-initial performance with the intact lifecycle event count attached; tests whether event count alone explains the advantage.
random_event_replay.label: event-count matched replay sham
